$comment: Brand-voice copy stub. Templ pages reference these keys via data-copy-slot=. The Lorem Ipsum placeholders ship as-is until the writing team replaces them. Adding new keys: keep them dot-namespaced by surface; Templ files use the data-copy-slot attribute and a future runtime swap will map slots to localized strings without touching templates. PLAN.md §144.

$lorem.ipsum-policy: Until copy lands per-slot, surfaces fall back to placeholder Lorem Ipsum text. The brand voice is short, friendly, plain-prose; avoid imperative shouting (no all-caps); avoid em-dashes inside button labels.
